owning_subsystem: .github workflow determinism, workspace dependency governance, and xtask validation dependencies
non_goals: Do not perform the SurrealDB, Wasmtime, or Leptos major-version migrations in this phase.
Do not change runtime, service, or UI behavior outside deterministic validation and manifest-governance needs.
Do not change the workspace edition in this phase.
scope_in: Add the umbrella and phase-1 execution-artifact bundles.
Remove the floating-toolchain hardening blocker in the GitHub workflow validation path.
Move governed external dependencies into root workspace inheritance.
Replace serde_yaml with serde_yaml_ng in xtask and upgrade xtask jsonschema.
scope_out: Non-UI runtime and storage major-version upgrades.
acceptance_criteria: cargo xtask ui-hardening no longer reports a floating Rust toolchain blocker.
The root workspace manifest centralizes governed external dependencies used across crates or critical runtimes.
xtask validation behavior remains functionally equivalent after the YAML and schema dependency refresh.
Phase-1 governance and architecture validation commands pass.
validation_artifacts: Passing xtask test and audit output
Passing UI hardening report without the floating-toolchain finding
Committed phase-1 plans and manifest updates
rollback_path: Revert the workflow/toolchain detection fix, root manifest governance changes, xtask dependency refresh, lockfile updates, and phase artifacts together so the repository returns to the previous baseline.
